name: nyc-civic-ingest
description: Node dev tooling for the NYC Civic Data Ingestion System. Sole purpose: the promptfoo eval CLI (CI diffs / PR comments). All runtime + Python eval deps live in requirements*.txt. promptfoo (MIT) was acquired by OpenAI in 2026 but remains open source; keep eval DATA vendor-neutral (JSONL) so we are never locked in. NOT a pip dependency.
